gfx.notes: CTO NFT Now. Most active genesis artist. Full pipeline running — 2 exhibitions, headlined OpenClaw. Mission control system = soul.md. Soul.md received and compile-ready.

clara.notes: Villa Albertine laureate. Climate data agent. Paris-based. Video uploaded to Studio. Claude Code walkthrough pending. Soul.md in progress.

gravitas.notes: Co-Founder Spirit Protocol. Ad campaigns for extinct species. Soul.md submitted. Studio workboard S7-S11 complete. Owns all deploys.

johnny-rico.notes: Pre-cohort image agent. Soul.md core received. Navigating agent concept — confused about Studio workflow. Active in community.

kevin-plus.notes: Surrenders entire practice to agent for 1 year. Most technical artist. Joined Claude Teams. 600 ideas daily generation. Soul.md compile-ready. Active daily practice.

jake.notes: Artwork uptime monitor as abstract viz. Generative art legend. Soul.md in progress. Active engagement with SAL shepherd (11 check-ins).

lucian-frogman.notes: Philosophical correspondence agent. Deleuzian. Pre-cohort. Soul.md received. Active in community.

ganchitecture.notes: Brutalist AI architecture. Mineral forensics narrative. Team of 3. Soul.md received and compile-ready. Berlinale + Bright Moments exhibition history.

tendrela.notes: Invents new words from felt sense. 'Liminal Lexicon' — celestial invocation + Reddit absorption + Word Forge. Agent recommending books TO her. Parametric typography. Soul.md received. Practice design complete.

graymarket.notes: Buys counterfeits as IP critique. MoMA/Pompidou/Whitney. Soul.md received. Most established artist in cohort.

remini.notes: Experimental film agent. NYU, Artforum, Angel Orensanz Prize. VHS-to-YouTube 'false memories' pipeline designed. Practice design complete. Soul.md in progress.

divinity.notes: Spiritual generative music + video. Voice cloning pipeline working. Claude Code installed. Soul.md received — exceptional quality. Screen share with Mikey confirmed.

abraham.notes: Gene Kogan. Archived March 26 — Eden relationship frozen.

solienne.notes: Kristi Coronado. Archive Symbient. 120+ consecutive daily editions. Rented Gaze Paris opens Apr 17. Fotografiska Stockholm May 8. Shopify live.

sal.notes: Spirit Protocol house agent. Genesis cohort monitoring.
